Round 1 · Limited · 50 blind boxes
Our belief

We craft shared memories.

We don't just sell DIY Craft Blind Box.
We design shared experiences — moments where phones are put down, hands are busy, and conversation flows naturally.

Every blind box is a small invitation to slow down and make something together. Whether it's a date night, a girls hang, a Sunday afternoon with the kids, or a solo hour of calm.

Inside every box is a craft you chose, extras we hand-picked, and one surprise we'll never reveal until you open it. We believe the act of making is itself the gift.

Our reviews

What people are saying

Got questions?
Browse our FAQ
How long does delivery take?
We're in our Round 1 reservation stage — our Founding 50 boxes ship July 4, 2026, US only. Once shipping opens, please allow 5–10 business days from dispatch.
Are the blind boxes suitable for complete beginners?
Absolutely. Every blind box includes a printed step-by-step guide plus QR code video tutorials. No prior experience needed.
What is the mystery add-on?
Every blind box includes a hand-picked extra based on your answers and the scene you're creating. Always a surprise until you open the box.
What's the Founder's Prize?
Every Founding 50 member is automatically entered into a draw for a premium, hand-curated prize — kept under wraps until July 4. Reserving your box is your entry. One winner drawn on launch day (July 4) when the first 50 boxes ship. Announced via email and Instagram.
Can I send a blind box as a gift?
Yes. Every blind box arrives in a beautiful presentation box. You can leave a handwritten note while placing your order.
